title: SLock Method, Spel Class
syntax:
Sub SLock ()

Sub SLock (ParamArray Axes() As Integer)
parameters: Axes	An integer parameter array containing one element for each robot axis to lock. You can specify axis numbers from 1 - 9.
description: Release the free joint state for the specified robot axes.
see_also:
SFree

SLock Example

VB Example:

' Release the free joint state of J1 and J2.

m_spel.SLock(1, 2)

C# Example:

// Release the free joint state of J1 and J2.

m_spel.SLock(1, 2);
examples:
' Release the free joint state of J1 and J2.
m_spel.SLock(1, 2)

// Release the free joint state of J1 and J2.
m_spel.SLock(1, 2);
